title: HG Fridge Freezer De-Icer - Quick-Acting Ice Remover & Defrosting Spray for Fast Cleaning - 500ml
features: HG Freezer De-Icer spray: Quickly and easily removes stubborn ice deposits from the freezer or deep-freeze fast. The ideal fridge freezer cleaner and ice remover for your home deep freeze
Super fast de-icer: Instant action ice spray works before frozen food starts to defrost. Switch off the fridge and remove food before use. A simple and effective defrost spray for all fridge freezers
Increases the lifespan of the freezer: Ice formation increases energy consumption as the motor has to work harder. This de icer for freezers helps to prolong your appliance's life and run effectively
Helps to save you time and money: Using the fast acting HG Freezer De-icer spray on your kitchen appliance on regular basis reduces icing-up formation, which helps to save running costs and energy
500ml HG Freezer Defroster Spray: Scrape away thick layers of ice, then spray with the defrost ice deicer. Let the fridge / freezer defroster work for 5-10 minutes before scraping the remaining ice
description: Product Description HG Freezer De-Icer (500ml spray) is a fast, effective freezer defroster to remove ice build up from your chest freezer, ice tray, under counter freezer or upright fridge/freezer. It’s ultra fast-acting, so the frozen food doesn’t get a chance to defrost. Keeping your appliance frost-free reduces your energy consumption and helps save money. Ice formation increases an appliance's energy use as the motor has to work harder. Using the HG professional freezer defrosting spray reduces iced-up formation, saving costs by helping the appliance to run efficiently for longer. To clean the fridge, we recommend HG Hygienic Fridge Cleaner. Discover HG's wide range of specialist cleaning products for your home, office and outside space. Includes: 1 x HG Freezer De-Icer/Defroster Spray Cleaner (500ml spray). How to use HG Freezer De-Icer: 1. Turn the freezer off, unload it and scrape away thick ice to remove as much as possible. 2. Liberally spray the remaining ice with HG Freezer De-icer. 3. Let the fridge / freezer spray work for 5-10 minutes and remove remaining ice. Repeat the treatment if necessary. 4. After removing the ice, dry the inside walls of the freezer. The freezer can now be turned on and used again. Ingredients cleaner Box Contains 1 x HG Freezer De-Icer 0.5L Manufacturer Contact Information Made by: HG International b.v., P.J. Oudweg 41, 1314 CJ Almere, The Netherlands. See more
